content: <iframe src="http://player.vimeo.com/video/15780202" width="400" height="300" frameborder="0"></iframe>        	    Time-lapse video of MUNI (street car) tracks replacement at Church & 30th in San Francisco. So efficient. Took about 4 days to complete according to the owner of the video whose apartment is right in front of the construction site. This will never here in Thailand. It could take 4 months to complete this kind of job. -"-
